data.title: ONE Data and Rockefeller Foundation to launch Development Finance Observatory in 2026. Analysis shows 124% increase in MDB financing, decrease in Chinese finance to Africa. US$4M collaboration.
data.description: A recent analysis marking the commencement of a collaborative effort totaling US$4 million has uncovered a significant 124% surge in financing from Multilateral Development Banks (MDBs). In contrast, there has been a noticeable decline in Chinese financial support exiting developing nations, notably impacting Africa the most. The findings from Washington on Jan. 27, 2026, shed light on the shifting patterns of international funding to developing economies.

data.title: US News & World Report released 2026 Best Online Programs rankings to aid students' career aspirations.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, U.S. News & World Report released its annual 2026 Best Online Programs rankings, showcasing the top programs in various fields. These rankings aim to assist students in making informed decisions about furthering their education and career prospects.

data.title: Huawei partners with Eliud Kipchoge's dsm-firmenich Running Team, introducing next-gen running watch.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on January 26, 2026, The dsm-firmenich Running Team, which includes renowned marathoner Eliud Kipchoge, revealed a groundbreaking collaboration with Huawei on January 5, 2026. Huawei has become their official technology partner, uniting with the exceptional team, recognized as the leading force in the industry.

data.title: Concordia International School Shanghai wins NIAAA award, the first in Asia. Awarded after rigorous evaluation.
data.description: In Shanghai on January 26, 2026, Concordia International School proudly revealed its groundbreaking achievement as the inaugural Asian school to be awarded the National Interscholastic Athletic Administrators Association (NIAAA) Quality Program certification. This recognition follows an extensive external assessment, solidifying Concordia's dedication to athletic excellence.

data.title: Mountain Lake Acquisition Corp. II priced its upsized IPO at $10 per unit, raising $313.2 million with 31.32 million units.
data.description: Incline Village, Nevada, January 26, 2026 - Today, Mountain Lake Acquisition Corp. II revealed details of its recent activities. The company, led by CEO Paul Grinberg and CFO Douglas Horlick, successfully priced an upsized initial public offering of 31,320,000 units. Each unit, priced at $10.00, consists of one Class A ordinary share and half a redeemable warrant. Holders of whole warrants can purchase one Class A share at $11.50 each. Trading for these units on Nasdaq under the symbol “MLAAU” is set to commence on January 27, 2026. Following unit separation, whole warrants and ordinary shares are expected to trade as “MLAAW” and “MLAA,” respectively, on the Nasdaq Global Market tier.

data.title: Geording Machinery reduces SME recycling costs by 30% with new all-in-one shredder, aims to support ESG push.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, in Taichung, Geording Machinery, a reputable company from Taiwan specializing in innovative plastic recycling systems, revealed the worldwide introduction of its Shredder Integrated Recycling Machine. This cutting-edge product is a versatile and comprehensive solution tailored for Small and Mid-sized enterprises.
